ns0:entry.ns0:title: AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
Language: go
Network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anchore/syft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anchore/syft
Language: go
CLI tool and library for generating a Software Bill of Materials from container images and filesystems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bluenviron/mediamtx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx
Language: go
Ready-to-use SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback video and audio streams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/osv-scanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/osv-scanner
Language: go
Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided by https://osv.dev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harness/harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harness/harness
Language: go
Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: henrygd/beszel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/henrygd/beszel
Language: go
Lightweight server monitoring with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubevirt/kubevirt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt
Language: go
Kubernetes Virtualization API and runtime in order to define and manage virtual machines.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lxc/incus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lxc/incus
Language: go
Powerful system container and virtual machine manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mark3labs/mcp-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go
Language: go
A Go implementation of the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling seamless integration between LLM applications and external data sources and tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: minio/minio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/minio/minio
Language: go
MinIO is a high-performance, S3 compatible object store, open sourced under GNU AGPLv3 license.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: runkids/skillshare
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/runkids/skillshare
Language: go
📚 Sync skills across all AI CLI tools with one command and simplify team sharing. Supporting Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw & more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sysadminsmedia/homebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sysadminsmedia/homebox
Language: go
A continuation of HomeBox the inventory and organization system built for the Home User
